rationale: Issue split from DRIVERS-1722; disabling isMaster network/command-error YAML tests on pre-4.9 servers.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1647; fixing CMAP integration test that enables an undisableable isMaster failpoint.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1704; SDAM pool-cleared-error test YAML file has wrong thread IDs.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1726; fixing race condition in pool-clear-min-size.yml spec test file.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1703; CMAP integration test waits for wrong event, fix in spec test file.
Re-enabling a previously disabled YAML spec test (WriteError errInfo) on latest sharded topology.
Flaky test fix for AcquireConnection dormant connections test; CI reliability, no spec behavior change.
Update minimum .NET and .NET Standard version; build/platform targeting, no spec behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1724; fixing race condition in pool-checkout-no-idle CMAP spec test.
CI test timeouts caused by hanging mongocryptd process; build/test environment issue, no spec behavior.
Operation ordering fix: handle SDAM error before returning connection to pool; no specific CMAP rule cited.
Timing fix: trigger cluster update before pool clear to close race window; implementation ordering detail not in spec.
Remove netstandard1.5 config from Evergreen; CI build configuration, no spec behavior.
LocalThreshold regression: no longer accepts InfiniteTimeSpan; API validation change, no spec rule on infinite timeout.
Race condition in SemaphoreSlimSignalable internal implementation; no spec rule about semaphore signaling semantics.
Build script broken: build.ps1 -target test fails; build tooling issue, no spec behavior.
Enum string parsing became case-insensitive in v2.12; C#-specific serializer regression, not a BSON spec requirement.
Request to make IMongoQueryProvider public; API ergonomics/visibility, no spec area involved.
Flaky PoolClearedError retryable reads test; CI reliability investigation, no new driver behavior.
Pool pruning incorrectly acquires maxConnectionsQueue slot causing wrong counters; implementation bug, no CMAP rule specifying pruning slot behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-1875; sync BSON corpus tests for new binary subtype 7 and add subtype constant.
Change stream resume fails on .NET 6.0 RC1; .NET runtime compatibility issue, server returns oplog error.
Syncing LB sdam-error-handling.json test file with latest spec; test infrastructure update.
Build config: run netstandard21 targets on .NET Core 3.1 to remove out-of-support warnings; CI tooling.
Upgrade build tooling to Cake 1.2.0 for C# 9 support; build dependency update, no spec behavior.
Sporadic failures in hello-timeout YAML spec test; CI flakiness investigation, no spec rule violated.
Issue split DRIVERS-1315, issuetype Improvement; proactive rollout to set minWireVersion 6, driver was not wrong before.
CStringUtf8Encoding emits invalid UTF-8 for surrogate pairs (emoji); BSON spec requires valid UTF-8 in strings and CStrings.
ArgumentOutOfRangeException from negative timeout passed to SemaphoreSlim; internal arithmetic bug, no spec rule on timeout calculation.
Reduce macOS CI task matrix; CI optimization, no spec behavior change.
ToUpperInvariant unsupported in LINQ despite documentation; LINQ feature gap, not a cross-language spec area.
Nested LINQ Select references wrong parent lambda variable; LINQ query translation bug, no MongoDB spec area.
Optimize LINQ3 translation of IsNullOrEmpty to use $in; internal LINQ improvement, no spec behavior change.
Experiment with XUnit custom timeout infrastructure; internal test tooling, no spec behavior.
Add simple logging instrumentation for use in tests; internal test tooling, no spec behavior.
Instrument tests with custom timeouts and logging; internal test infrastructure, no spec behavior.
Refactor LinqProvider from class to enum to hide internal API; public API cleanup, no spec behavior.
Select() inside Project() references wrong lambda variable in generated aggregation; LINQ translation bug, no spec area.
IsNullOrEmpty with null-coalescing argument throws in LINQ Where; LINQ provider feature gap, no spec area.
SelectMany does not support DefaultIfEmpty() for preserveNullAndEmptyArrays; LINQ feature gap, no spec area.
LINQ3 documentation for 2.14.0 beta; documentation task, no spec behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-1882; resync spec tests for serverless:forbid and update load-balanced serverless test setup.
GuidRepresentationMode.V3 fails in aggregation $project; C#-specific GUID mode API bug, not a BSON spec rule.
Remove netstandard1.5 from LINQ3; platform targeting cleanup, no spec behavior.
LINQ3 missing calls to PartialEvaluator; internal LINQ3 implementation bug, no MongoDB spec area.
Rephrase XML doc comments that still mention netstandard1.5; documentation update, no spec behavior.
LINQ aggregation cannot project $$ROOT; LINQ feature gap in aggregation pipeline translation, no cross-language spec.
Dynamic LINQ ParameterExpression requires name or throws null exception; LINQ provider internal requirement, no spec area.
Driver does not allow aggregations at document level via LINQ; LINQ feature gap, no cross-language spec.
x.ToLower().Equals() throws NotSupportedException in LINQ; LINQ feature gap, no cross-language spec area.
